question: Overall, how did CO2 emissions in Country N change from 2006 to 2017?

options.A: They generally decreased despite some fluctuations.
options.B: They showed no clear overall change and remained roughly constant.
options.C: They generally increased despite some fluctuations.
options.D: They stayed exactly the same every year.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear increasing when it is actually decreasing.
